user_stories.title: Generate Embeddings
user_stories.i_want_to: generate vector embeddings for each transcript chunk
user_stories.so_that: I can perform semantic similarity searches.
acceptance_criteria: Integrate with an Embedding Model Provider (OpenAI `text-embedding-3-small` or local equivalent).
Generate a float array (vector) for each `TranscriptChunk`.
Handle API rate limits and failures gracefully.
user_stories.technical_notes: Use `ruby_llm` gem. Store API keys securely.

user_stories.title: Store Vectors in PCVector
user_stories.i_want_to: store embeddings in PostgreSQL using pgvector
user_stories.so_that: I can run fast similarity queries directly in the database.
acceptance_criteria: Add an HNSW index for fast approximate nearest neighbor search.
user_stories.technical_notes: Use `neighbour` gem for ActiveRecord integration with pgvector.
